name: Diplomat's Pack
description: A Diplomat's Pack contains the following items: {@item Chest|XPHB}, {@item Fine Clothes|XPHB}, {@item Ink|XPHB}, 5 {@item Ink Pen|XPHB|Ink Pens}, {@item Lamp|XPHB}, 2 {@item Map or Scroll Case|XPHB|Map or Scroll Cases}, 4 flasks of {@item Oil|XPHB}, 5 sheets of {@item Paper|XPHB}, 5 sheets of {@item Parchment|XPHB}, {@item Perfume|XPHB}, and {@item Tinderbox|XPHB}.
